2026-06-22GACExport and Import Permits ActOrder Amending the Import Control List (2026-2)Order Amending the Import Control List (2026-2) in order to remove references to the UK as ‘exempt’ from import permit requirements.Registration: SOR/2026-0156 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Order Amending the Import Control List (2026-2)
precis: Order Amending the Import Control List (2026-2) in order to remove references to the UK as ‘exempt’ from import permit requirements.
